title: Global Markets Brief — 02 Jul 2026
intro: Risk-off sentiment dominates Asian trade as Nikkei plunges 2.35% on renewed yen strength and profit-taking, while haven flows lift USD/JPY concerns despite modest crypto gains.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-off sentiment dominates Asian trade as Nikkei plunges 2.35% on renewed yen strength and profit-taking, while haven flows lift USD/JPY concerns despite modest crypto gains.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
GBP +0.11% — Sterling extends gains on sticky UK services inflation expectations
EUR +0.06% — Euro consolidates above 1.13 handle on ECB hawkish repricing
NZD +0.02% — Kiwi treads water despite dairy auction weakness
AUD -0.01% — Aussie flat as iron ore prices stabilize near term lows
USD/CAD +0.01% — Loonie pressured by crude oil decline below $68
CHF -0.07% — Swiss franc weakens as safe-haven demand rotates to gold
JPY -0.18% — Yen softens after touching 161 overnight, intervention fears ease

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1391 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: Break above 1.1420 targets 1.1480, support at 1.1350
USDJPY 162.23 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: Vulnerable near 163.00 intervention zone, downside to 160.50
GBPUSD 1.3297 | Bias: LONG | Watch: Cable eyes 1.3350 resistance, dips to 1.3250 buyable

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
Nikkei 225: 68818 -2.35% — Sharp selloff on yen strength crushing exporters
S&P 500: 5745.76 -0.14% — Wall Street closed marginally lower on tech weakness
Nasdaq: 26040 -0.66% — Tech-heavy index pressured by valuation concerns
DAX: 25040 +0.18% — German equities outperform on industrial optimism

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold: $4082 -0.01% — Hovering near record highs as geopolitical hedging persists amid Middle East tensions
WTI Crude: $67.84 -1.08% — Oil slides on demand concerns and Saudi production increase speculation
Silver: $60.41 -0.16% — Industrial metal dips following equities lower in risk-off trade

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin: $60415 +0.76% — BTC consolidates above $60k support with sideways grind likely until macro catalysts emerge
Ethereum: $1624 +1.03% — ETH shows relative strength on network upgrade optimism and institutional accumulation signals

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: USDJPY 161.50 | Fade toward intervention zone for bounce to 163.50
LONG: Gold 4065 | Dips remain buying opportunity toward $4150 on safe-haven demand
SHORT: Nikkei 69200 | Rallies capped by
